svg.title: Fault response and hazard divert scenario comparison
svg.text: Corridor guidance uses estimated state and flight-like command-path dynamics in every case.
The hazard divert lands 5.47 m clear of the debris zone and changes remaining propellant by +4 kg.
The 18% thrust-loss case crosses the terminal footprint boundary: error -4.86 m, exposing loss of divert authority before propellant depletion.
